notes: TUI runtime has executable MVP entrypoint and smoke check.
Neovim runtime has executable plugin modules, command registration and headless smoke coverage.
Vim compatibility is intentionally deferred until Neovim runtime delivery reaches stability.

Eclipse runtime status is runtime_mvp: Java client uses existing generic Hub paths, command handlers extend Eclipse AbstractHandler, views have ViewPart adapter classes, and the local p2 site is installable.

Eclipse JEE 2026-03 Docker evidence verifies p2 installation and separately verifies that all Ananta views are registered/openable via Workbench API when the plugin is loaded; the stricter p2-install-then-workbench verifier remains blocked by Eclipse JEE/Oomph profile startup instability.
VS Code runtime has command/view MVP delivery, smoke coverage, and dedicated CI lane packaging evidence.
